summary: Frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ Team Directory profile picture fix and Equipment Handover UI completed successfully. All 7 requested features verified working in demo mode.
passed_tests: Team Directory (/team) - Profile picture avatars are fully visible and not clipped (circular avatars with initials display correctly)
Team Directory - 3-dot menu is properly positioned in top right of each member card
Team Directory - Add Member modal has profile picture upload UI with camera icon and 'Click camera to upload photo' instruction
Team Directory - Edit Member modal (via 3-dot menu) has profile picture upload UI with camera icon
Equipment page (/equipment) - Inventory tab shows equipment grid with 6 items
Equipment page - Check Out/Check In functionality works correctly with success toasts
Equipment page - Status badges display correctly (available=green, maintenance=red)
Equipment page - Handovers tab shows 2 demo handover records with From→To transfer flow
Equipment page - Handover records show team badges (Envoy/E-Nation), condition badges (good/fair), and condition notes
Equipment page - New Handover modal works with equipment selection, team selection, member selection, condition buttons (Good/Fair/Needs Repair)
Equipment page - New handover creation works and adds record to list with success toast
Mobile responsiveness - Team Directory works on mobile (390x844) with single column layout, visible avatars, and 3-dot menus
Mobile responsiveness - Equipment Inventory tab works on mobile with stacked cards and full-width buttons
Mobile responsiveness - Equipment Handovers tab works on mobile with readable From→To flow
test_credentials: Demo mode - no credentials required. Click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page.
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses DEMO_EQUIPMENT, DEMO_HANDOVERS, and DEMO_MEMBERS arrays defined in Equipment.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile picture avatar fix verified - the MemberCard component now displays avatars without clipping. The avatar sits in normal flow with padding instead of using overflow-hidden. Equipment Handover UI fully functional with Inventory and Handovers tabs. Demo mode uses hardcoded arrays for equipment, handovers, and members data.
mocked_api_note: DEMO MODE uses MOCKED data - Equipment data (DEMO_EQUIPMENT), Handover data (DEMO_HANDOVERS), and Team members data (DEMO_MEMBERS) are hardcoded arrays in the React components.

team_directory_avatar_fix.details: Profile picture avatars are fully visible with circular shape, colored backgrounds based on name, and initial letters. No clipping or overflow issues.

team_directory_3dot_menu.details: 3-dot menu positioned in top right corner of each card with absolute positioning. Opens dropdown with Edit and Delete options.

add_member_modal_profile_upload.details: Add Member modal includes profile picture upload UI with camera icon overlay and 'Click camera to upload photo' instruction text.

edit_member_modal_profile_upload.details: Edit Member modal (accessed via 3-dot menu > Edit) includes profile picture upload UI with existing member's initial displayed.

equipment_inventory_tab.details: Shows 6 equipment items in grid layout with name, category, status badge, notes, and Check Out/Check In buttons.

equipment_checkout_checkin.details: Check Out changes status to 'checked_out' and shows Check In button. Check In returns status to 'available'. Both show success toasts.

equipment_handovers_tab.details: Shows 2 demo handover records with equipment name, date, From user (with team badge), arrow, To user (with team badge), condition badge, and notes.

new_handover_modal.details: Modal includes: Equipment dropdown (filters to available only), Transfer To Team dropdown, Receiving Member dropdown (updates based on team), Condition buttons (Good/Fair/Needs Repair), Condition Notes textarea, Cancel and Confirm Handover buttons.

new_handover_creation.details: Creating new handover adds record to list, shows success toast 'Equipment handover recorded', and displays new record at top of list.

mobile_team_directory.details: Single column layout on 390x844 viewport. Avatars fully visible, 3-dot menus accessible, filter buttons wrap properly, Add Member button full width.

mobile_equipment_page.details: Both Inventory and Handovers tabs work on mobile. Cards stack vertically, buttons full width, From→To flow readable with truncated names.
